title: Ike, Commander of the Undying Brigade
overview: The Demon King's army continues to fight against humans. Ike, the leader of the Undying Brigade, is the grandson of the great magician Romberg. Despite being respected, Ike hides his human identity, fearing the disaster it would cause should it be known.

title: Alistair, Leader of the White Rose Knights
overview: Ike and Satie attempt to gather information about the next human attack. Meanwhile, Alistair from the White Rose Knights is already gathering her troops behind him...

title: Traitor
overview: A traitor is revealed in the Demon Lord's army, and Ike begins to hunt them down...

title: Duel
overview: Dairokuten demands Cefiro fight a duel with one of the other Corps commanders. But Cefiro has something else in mind...

title: Ambition
overview: Ike battles the treacherous Basteo and his undead legions.

title: Dwarf King
overview: Ike seeks the aid of another race for the upcoming battle with the humans.

title: War Begins
overview: The Alliance of Kings begins their assault on Ike's forces.

title: The Final Battle at Ivalias
overview: Ike begins his counterattack to defend Ivalias from the human army.

title: Negotiations
overview: Ike goes to negotiate with the Trade Federation for badly-needed supplies.

title: Pirates
overview: When Satie is kidnapped by pirates, Ike goes all-out to rescue her.

title: Cefiro is Defeated
overview: Cefiro is defeated, and Ike rushes to her aid.

title: General E. Rudle
overview: Ike arrives to save Cefiro, and uses a cunning plan and new weapons in his battle against the brilliant enemy general.
